column1: # RAW MATERIALS TEMPLATE - Fill this sheet second (after suppliers)
# Each row = One raw material item
# IMPORTANT: Supplier Name must exactly match the Company Name from SUPPLIERS sheet
# 1. Material Name: Name of the raw material (REQUIRED)
# 4. Current Stock: How much you have right now (numbers only)
# 6. Min Stock Level: Minimum quantity before reordering
# 7. Max Storage Capacity: Maximum you can store
# 8. Reorder Point: When to order more (usually same as min stock level)
# 9. Supplier Name: Must exactly match Company Name from SUPPLIERS sheet (REQUIRED)
# 10. Cost Per Unit: Price per unit in rupees (REQUIRED)
# 11. Batch Number: Batch or lot number
# 13. Image URL: Link to product image (optional)
